description: In-app help shown beside a Desk form or portal page, holding institution-specific notes and an optional documentation link. Use it to give your staff and students guidance tailored to how this seminary works.

fields.description: Vue route name (e.g. Courses, CourseDetail, Transcripts) — NOT the file name. See the route names in frontend/src/router.js.
fields.label: Frontend Page

fields.description: Optional. On Desk forms the documentation link comes from the doctype's own "Documentation Link" property; this field is mainly for frontend (Vue) pages that have no doctype.
fields.label: Documentation Link (optional)

fields.description: Show help icon to students on the LMS frontend
fields.label: Show to Students

fields.description: How we do it at this seminary — institution-specific instructions, shown inline on the form.
fields.label: Local Notes

name: Seminary Help Entry
